T0029.title: One-Yuan Arbitrage Crew
T0029.description: Literally refers to people who habitually buy items costing only one yuan. It has evolved to describe groups who seek out group purchases, lucky draws, and promotional offers online, hoping to acquire high-value goods for minimal cost—essentially couponers or bonus hunters. This group includes stay-at-home mothers, college students, and part-timers. They actively participate in various promotions, using coupons, red packets, and discounts provided by merchants to obtain goods or services at low or zero cost, gathering deal information through various channels to gain benefits.
